overall.description: Nighttime hike along a narrow dirt trail between a rock wall and forest vegetation, illuminated by a warm headlamp or flashlight. The footage shows a continuous first-person perspective walking steadily through the dark natural environment with no other people visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain trail between rock wall and forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt trail, illuminating the path ahead with a headlamp while navigating between the rock wall and vegetation

entered.detail: thick tree trunk with rough bark visible at the edge of the light
large sloped rock wall or cliff face running alongside the trail
narrow winding dirt trail with scattered small rocks and patches of grass
tall grass and low shrubs lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt trail at night, illuminated by a warm artificial light source. The path winds between a large rock formation on the right and dense vegetation on the left, with the large tree trunk initially visible on the left passing out of frame as the hike continues deeper into the dark forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a narrow dirt trail that winds deeper into a dark, nocturnal forest. It begins with a warm artificial light illuminating the path, passing a large tree trunk on the left as the camera advances. As the hike continues, the perspective shifts further into the wilderness, moving steadily between a towering rock formation on the right and dense vegetation on the left. The scene then narrows as the initial landmarks fade, leaving only the glow of the headlamp to carve a path through the surrounding darkness.
